title: Mobs more enchantments
description: A mod that adds vanilla style enchantments
body:
This mod aims to give the player more choices when it comes to enchantments, adding in some hopefully vanilla-friendly enchantments

Currently, this mod adds:

Leeching

Veinminer

Autosmelting

Shocking

Persist

Vacuum

Harvest



This mod is also compatible with Enchantment Descriptions by default
